name: HUMAN CHORIONIC GONADOTROPIN
chapter: DIFFERENTIAL DIAGNOSIS OF OBSTETRIC AND GYNECOLOGIC
definition: hCG = glycoprotein elaborated by placental trophoblastic cells beginning the 8th day after indirect agglutination test for hCG in urine; cross-reaction with other hormones / measures beta subunit of hCG in serum with a sensitivity as low as 1-2 mIU/mL
